details.productUrlName: Sauron the Dark Lord Showcase Surge Foil

customAttributes.description:
Ward—Sacrifice a legendary artifact or legendary creature.
Whenever an opponent casts a spell, amass Orcs 1.
Whenever an Army you control deals combat damage to a player, the Ring tempts you.
Whenever the Ring tempts you, you may discard your hand. If you do, draw four cards.
customAttributes.detailNote: This product is a Presale item with an estimated shipping date of 11/3/2023. Please keep in mind card details, including rarity and card name, may change up until release date as information is updated.
